markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review production performance and introduce new support structures.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance Gap:** Only \~30% of clients meet the 30-min/deliverable target, while \~33% are far off. This inefficiency cascades, forcing MEs to spend time on structural fixes instead of quality improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [**New Support Layer:** Team Leads (Sydney, Jen) will troubleshoot high-effort accounts (e.g., Rimkus) by diagnosing issues and building scalable solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** The primary cause of high Time to Delivery (TTD) is poor pipeline inputs: artifact conflicts and instructions lacking the necessary context for the AI to execute.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
  - [**Proactive Action Required:** MEs with TTD \>1.5–2 hours must proactively file tickets for support. Failure to do so will result in direct intervention.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)

## Topics

### The Production Performance Gap

  - [**Performance Snapshot:**](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
      - **Good (30%):** Meets all targets (quality, performance, TTD \<30 min).
      - [**Within Striking Distance (\~33%):** Meets some targets but needs improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
      - [**Far Away (\~33%):** Significantly misses targets.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [**The Cascading Problem:** High TTD is a leading indicator of pipeline issues.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
      - [**Pipeline Failure →** MEs spend time on structural fixes (rewrites) instead of quality improvements (SEO, narrative).](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
      - [**Result →** Lower-quality content and client dissatisfaction.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [**Key Metric:**](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
      - [**Average TTD:** 1 hour, 4 minutes.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
      - [**Red Flag:** TTD \>1.5–2 hours, indicating a need for immediate action.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [**High-Effort Clients:** Relay, Diligent, Field Guide, Rimkus, Cresta, Navon.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Rimkus Example:** High TTD is due to complex legal review and pipeline issues. Leadership is now involved (e.g., stakeholder calls in March) to resolve this.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)

### New Support Structure: Team Leads

  - [**Purpose:** Bridge the gap between the EM and ME layers to provide focused, hands-on support.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [**Role:** Diagnose and fix pipeline issues, not edit every deliverable.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
      - [**Focus:** High-effort clients (TTD \>200–300% of average).](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**Method:** Audit pipelines, identify root causes (process, pipeline, or editor), and build scalable solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [**Sprint Team's Role:**](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
      - [**Sydney:** Ensure pipelines are performant *before* they leave Sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
      - [**Goal:** Deliver pipelines that meet client expectations and TTD targets from day one.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
      - [**Benefit:** A well-calibrated Sprint pipeline directly improves the Production team's ability to maintain quality.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)

### Root Cause Analysis: Pipeline Inputs

  - [**Primary Cause of High TTD:** Poor pipeline inputs, not editor skill.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
  - [**Two Main Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
    1.  **Artifact Conflicts:** Conflicting instructions across pipeline artifacts.
          - [**Solution:** Use the **Convergence Report** to identify conflicts.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
    2.  **Lack of Context:** Instructions requiring information the AI doesn't have.
          - [**Example:** "Write something funnier than last time." The AI has no memory of past runs.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
          - [**Solution:** Provide explicit context (e.g., "Write a CTA like this example: \[paste text\]").](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)
  - [**Client Perception:** Clients are skeptical of AI-generated content and will scrutinize every deliverable for errors.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
      - [**Action:** Editors must be vigilant to build and maintain client trust.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)

### Administrative Items

  - [**Sprint Team Pipeline Work:** The Sprint team is fixing org-wide pipelines (e.g., the "refresh" pipeline), which will benefit all MEs.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
  - [**Artifact Management:** New content types (e.g., comparison articles) require new, context-specific artifacts. Do not reuse artifacts from standard editorial pipelines.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
  - [**Skills Assessment:** Complete the form to help Matthew assign clients that align with your experience.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=1880.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**MEs with TTD \>1.5–2 hours:** Proactively file tickets for support.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [**All MEs:** Use the Convergence Report and check instructions for context.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
  - [**All MEs:** Complete the skills assessment form.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=1880.0)
  - [**Matthew's Team:** Circulate the skills assessment link.](https://fathom.video/share/Svv7pVAZGQxCx5oKNg4FwRVdiAY7vn97?tab=summary&timestamp=1952.0)
